query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN fileUrl IS NOT NULL AND fileUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_url,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fileUrl IS NULL OR fileUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_url
FROM secure_documents;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN fileUrl IS NOT NULL AND fileUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_url,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fileUrl IS NULL OR fileUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_url
FROM secure_documents;
